# Hidden Commands

gcloud commands can be marked as
hidden
(not easily discoverable).

## gcloud Config

Use the
`root_is_hidden`
attribute to hide all commands and command groups for your service, and make
sure it is defined in every

```
apis:
- name: HiddenCommand
  api_version: v1
  release_tracks:
  - GA
  root_is_hidden: true
```

## YAML Output

*   Commands and command groups are hidden

```
@base.ReleaseTracks(base.ReleaseTrack.GA)
@base.Autogenerated
@base.Hidden
class HiddenCommandGa(base.Group):
  """Manage Hidden Command resources."""
```

```
- release_tracks:
  - GA
  auto_generated: true
  hidden: true
  help_text:
    brief: Describe resources
    description: Describe a resource
    examples: |-
      To describe the resource, run:

      $ {command}
  arguments:
    ...
```
